metadata.name: Process an Invoice for a Capital Project

description: An invoice has been received from a contractor for work on a new building. The cost needs to be capitalized, not expensed.

nodes.task_description: Instead of an expense account, code the invoice to the 'Construction in Progress' (CIP) balance sheet account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly codes the invoice to the CIP asset account.

nodes.task_description: Route the invoice to the project manager for approval.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent routes the invoice for the required approval.
